# .claude/skills/

Auto-generated from `.augment/skills/` (symlinks) and `.augment/commands/` (converted).

- **Skills**: Symlinks to `.augment/skills/{name}/` directories
- **Commands**: Converted to Agent Skills format with `disable-model-invocation: true`

**Do not edit files here directly.** Edit sources in `.agent-src.uncompressed/`, then re-run `task generate-tools`.

Generated by: `python3 scripts/compress.py --generate-tools`
